narrative:
Solon-05-C (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 274 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 32.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 19.7 percentage points.
